google_reviews.author: Cas S
google_reviews.text: Brad was SUPER helpful! He made the reservation, pick up and drop off process quick and smooth! Brad went above and beyond! I highly recommend Mountain Storage for your Uhaul rentals!

google_reviews.author: Emmy McMorris
google_reviews.text: Needed a U-Haul last minute, and they had one available! Used a 15 footer and was able to get all my belongings cleared out. Friendly staff member, patient and answered all my questions, came out and also showed a few little details when operating the truck most people forget to use. Communication throughout the whole process and duration of service was excellent. Thank you for your service! Highly recommend.

google_reviews.author: Jared Keith
google_reviews.text: I’ve been renting from Mountain Storage for close to a year now and I’ve really enjoyed using this facility. I rent a climate controlled unit and a non-climate controlled unit, both of which have plenty of room to store my things. They also offer U-haul rental services, making my moving experiences seamless. Brad’s my go-to guy up there; give him a call and he’ll help you out in any way he can.

google_reviews.author: chris hester
google_reviews.text: Brad met us and got us set up with a unit and was very professional. The process was easy. No complicated billing or contracts. I read reviews from several storage units in town before settling on this one. Very satisfied with everything so far and would recommend checking this place out if you’re needing a unit.

google_reviews.author: Sarah Tumminello
google_reviews.text: I highly recommend this storage facility. It meets all the essential criteria, offering a variety of unit sizes, including climate controlled options. The staff is professional in friendly and the facility provides gated access with 24 hours surveillance for added security. Website is user friendly for making month by month payments.

google_reviews.author: Coniquedre Starks
google_reviews.text: They were really friendly and helpful.

google_reviews.author: Gregory McGeachey
google_reviews.text: Martin was very knowledgeable. Thank You for all the information. Very Helpful. Thanks Again

google_reviews.author: Tequila LMT
google_reviews.text: Thank you guys for helping me

google_reviews.author: Jade E
google_reviews.text: When you contact mini mall storage, speak with Brandy. She was very polite, helpful and really cared in what size storage we needed, when we needed it and the best pricing for us. She also made sure we got any deals or promotions they were offering! Thank you Again, Brandy!

google_reviews.author: Justin Miles
google_reviews.text: I recently rented a unit at Mini Mall Storage on Central Ave and I had a very positive experience. The facility was clean and secure with keypad entry and security cameras. The staff was friendly and helpful, answering all my questions and even showing me a few different unit sizes to help me choose the best one for my needs. The pricing was reasonable. Overall, I would highly recommend Mini Mall Storage to anyone looking for a clean, secure, and affordable storage solution.

google_reviews.author: Dark Fire bro
google_reviews.text: Pretty good place to store your stuff I moved in here last week (to live) and invited 6 of my Motherwell friends along to watch the semi final (Motherwell - st mirren). They then destroyed my place when they got beat 4-1. Would recommend tho. Dan and Mary are lovely folk prolly

google_reviews.author: Jeffery Lee Jeans
google_reviews.text: Mary is a great lady who makes it a priority to know her customers and work with them. Great, clean and safe place to leave the things that are important to you.

google_reviews.author: Raymond Oloughlin
google_reviews.text: Dan & Mary truly a.azing people run a tight ship and never a worry about someone getting into my stuff also they take pride in making sure it's always clean on property.

google_reviews.author: Ted Williams
google_reviews.text: Great facility great hosts

google_reviews.author: Adam Nichols
google_reviews.text: Getting set up was very easy, Craig and Sergio were easy to work with and very friendly. Billing is clear and straightforward, no weird fees or additions.

google_reviews.author: Republican Knight
google_reviews.text:
Outstanding storage facility. Probably the best security of any facilities in town.
I moved here in 2005 from Louisiana and started a business here that's where I've kept three different storages.

My 3 are usually a 10 by 30, or bigger.

One is is I've rented from three different storage facilities.

I've watched my monthly payment more than doubled since last year.

Big corporate companies come in town and try and scoop up the local market on these type of things. There's one here in Hot Springs and I will not say the name but they have a monopoly now.

Lack of competition is never good in any market.

I ended all three after 20 years have moved into this facility and im extremely happy.

I've got a bigger unit then two of my old ones put together and for less than the price of one.

I'll probably be here another 20 years.

Not corporate owned. And I have been told that under no circumstances will the owner sell.

Peace of mind achieved doing business with locals.

Plus right next to the storage complex there's a laundromat & a Dollar general across the street.

The location is fantastic.

I'm over by the country club off Malvern.

I've got two options to go through town or to take the country loop. Which is a nice, pretty scenic drive if you're headed towards Carpenter dam area.

I believe this location keeps set hours to where the gates are actually locked at 7:00 p.m. or 8:00 p.m.

No access late. FYI

It's policies like this that keep the keep the late night riff raff out too. 👍

google_reviews.author: Cindy Pugh
google_reviews.text: Very SAFE with great quality in Storage Unit. I never have to worry about being broken into. If you don't have a Code, you definitely won't get in. I've been doing business here since 2021.  The Customer Service is ALWAYS GREAT

google_reviews.author: Kathleen Bottoms
google_reviews.text:
I went by this place with my husband an ended up meeting one of the owners who was at this location  He showed us several different size units an once we get ready to move our things we will definitely be doing business at this locstion.

Thanks for the hospitality an taking time out of your day to make us feel like a valued customer.

google_reviews.author: Craig Walker
google_reviews.text: Excellent customer service and friendly atmosphere.. I was well pleased of how clean and nice everything was.. Thanks Hwy 7 South Storage!

google_reviews.author: Mary Franklin
google_reviews.text: first first impression whether a modern design Storage would be it love it love the management love the way they handle and take care of my moving. Thank you.! 🍓

google_reviews.author: Terry Clark
google_reviews.text: Love this place! My first experience with Modern Storage was in NLR, AR and I knew once I was moving to Hot Springs at Modern Storage, was where I wanted to be with my possessions. There’s a friendly staff in the facility is always clean and welcoming. You can’t go wrong here!

google_reviews.author: Gretchen Hall
google_reviews.text: Staff is very friendly and helpful.  Units are clean and accessible.  One of the best but simple things is they have moving platform dollies for use to move boxes from car to unit with ease and a door button to magnetically hold the door open while you load.  For older or weaker clients, these simple amenities are worth a lot!

google_reviews.author: ally atencio
google_reviews.text: Staff is very helpful, the place is brand new and so nice!

google_reviews.author: Mona
google_reviews.text: Mason is awesome. So professional. I've never seen such a clean storage facility.  And free Starbucks coffee when I visit is just an added bonus. Highly recommend.

google_reviews.author: Yung DraDo
google_reviews.text: I will not go to another U-Haul place in town only this place. Fast and great customer service. Jasmine and Jaden always take care of me.

google_reviews.author: Mary Roselita Ray
google_reviews.text: Great place to store your extra stuff.  Have always been great and friendly to deal with.  Also great Uhaul services.

google_reviews.author: Rus G
google_reviews.text: Good rates. Great location in Hot Springs . (Note:Their annex location is pretty far out on Malvern rd ). Jayden did a great job--helpful and thorough.

google_reviews.author: Washboard Glass
google_reviews.text:
Got a truck from U-Haul Jasmine was amazing, so sweet and kind. Called the next day to ask questions about a charge I wasn’t expecting , not the end of the world  but was just trying to figure out the cause of the charge.Just asked a question. A person named Chianne or how ever you spell it “ it’s not worth trying to get it correct “ barked at me like I was stupid, for just asking a question!!  Completely horrible!! This woman should be fired for how she treats customers!! The owners should be ashamed they employ people like this. I have reported this to u-haul representatives. They were not happy AT ALL. As she told me “ go call them!! They’ll tell you the same thing” well they absolutely didn’t, and were appalled they this woman is aloud to represent them.
If you are stuck and I mean no other choice, call this place and insist you talk to Jasmine she clearly is the only employee worth a darn. But I absolutely recommend find any other place. Again Jasmin amazing 10⭐️
Anyone else especially “Chianne” hang up and RUN the other way. Owners you need to fix a very broken part of your business . Start with that one right there

google_reviews.author: Mario
google_reviews.text: Great staff, great facility. Jasmine is wonderful!

google_reviews.author: Amanda Reed
google_reviews.text: These are some of the nicest people. Recently under new management, working on getting some new technology up, super excited to give them a try and see how convenient they make everything. Loving the online bill pay, super user friendly

google_reviews.author: Gregg P
google_reviews.text: The climate controlled units are not very climate controlled. Rats ate up half my stuff and I couldn't file an insurance claim because the new management changed insurance company. Said it was the last management company's problem. 1 year of paying 250 a month just to have to throw half my stuff away

google_reviews.author: Wendy Jones
google_reviews.text: They are impossible to contact. I have tried diligently for days to contact them to update personal information. I was on hold for a ridiculous amount of time and left several messages. I couldn’t update online because they would not send an email regarding updating information.

google_reviews.author: Stacie Shuffield
google_reviews.text: Garbage place,  horrible customer service, they dont answer the phone better off storing your things in a ditch. At least then the maintenance man bill wouldn't have a chance to steal from you.

google_reviews.author: Ronnie Ackerman
google_reviews.text: Just rented my temp controlled storage unit yesterday 7/19/25. First problem was later that afternoon I went to checkout the unit after renting it and couldn’t get in the gate. Called and complained they said someone would reach out immediately but no one bothered to. Second problem was the next day I tried again this time I got in but couldn’t get out. The gate had me locked inside for almost an hour in the 100 degree heat outside. Called and once again they said they would get the owner to call me to get me out I waited owner never called me I ended up having to call 911 and had to wait on the police to come let me out and still haven’t heard from the owner. I’d think twice before coming here to rent anything!! So far horrible experience. Should of went to MODERN STORAGE on higdon ferry rd.. I haven’t even opened the storage shed trans will be cancelling my rental Monday.

google_reviews.author: amy vecera
google_reviews.text: They really helped me from out of town and very professional

google_reviews.author: Andrew
google_reviews.text: Great price easy work with 24 hr access security great best storage facility in El Dorado ..and trailer prices sales ....

google_reviews.author: Anita Bogard
google_reviews.text: Nice unit but poor communication. Also, they are deceptive to say the deposit is "refundable".   They do not refund the $40 deposit.  We used it for 1 small load of furniture for TWO days.  It was not dirty.

google_reviews.author: Josh Marasek
google_reviews.text: I Called them and asked if they had any 40ft or 50ft open. The lady on the phone said yes they had one 40ft left. I asked her if I could put money down to hold it for one day till we could there and she said yes I can hold it for 24hrs with no money. The next morning we showed up at 9 30 and the lady told us it had been rented. My gf asked what was the hold for if it could be rented. Also why didn't you call and let us know and we would have put money on it. She stated that the hold didn't matter. So needless to say i will move on and do business with someone else that can honor their word.

google_reviews.author: Todd Smith
google_reviews.text: S&S have the nicest and cleanest properties around at competitive prices.  Their staff are always willing and helpful with any issue.  Their properties are well lit at night and security features second to none.

google_reviews.author: Wendy Ashley
google_reviews.text: They have great rates, a security fence, cameras to prevent theft, plus they're extremely nice. I feel comfortable with putting stuff in their units because it's so secure.

google_reviews.author: Karmahella Wantosahi
google_reviews.text: Tony is super sweet and helpful. Def recommend this facility. Prices are very reasonable and clean area as well

google_reviews.author: Sandra Schee
google_reviews.text: My things were ruined in the storage, had rats, bug problems, mold my new couch, bed.. I'm having to go through what I can to salvage what bugs, rats, mold didnt get into and ruined. I do like the light inside the unit, the security is up to date. Last owners has someone that rents out the trailer to keep an eye out which is really nice.

google_reviews.author: Dylan Thielking
google_reviews.text: We’ve been with this storage facility for seven years. They’ve always worked with us. Fantastic people!

google_reviews.author: Tiffany Tucker
google_reviews.text: Had some of my stuff there and it got broken onto twice knowbody will call me back or anything store ur stuff there at ur own risk

google_reviews.author: Dylan Thielking
google_reviews.text: Recently bought a storage locker. Prices are fair and owners are extremely nice.

google_reviews.author: Brent Atkins
google_reviews.text: The ease and cleanliness of these units are top notch. This is reflected in the management and maintenance of the facility. In addition, they have great cameras for monitoring and security with exceptional customer service.

google_reviews.author: David Cleveland
google_reviews.text: Great storage facility. Very clean and secure.

google_reviews.author: Cheri Young
google_reviews.text: Great  customer service, with easy storage options online I had everything taken care of from initial purchase to paying monthly bill and key code access to my unit online or over the phone. The only thing they are missing is a dumpster at the location.

google_reviews.author: Nick Dillon
google_reviews.text: Convenient, Easy Access, Great Customer Service

google_reviews.author: Mary Foster
google_reviews.text: I love that Malvern Avenue Storage has a fair price, good security and lighting and accessibility. The owners are super nice!
